categories.label: Response Playbooks
categories.description: Automated incident-response workflows triggered by alerts or manual invocation.

categories.label: Detection Rules
categories.description: Sigma-inspired YAML rules for identifying malicious or suspicious activity.

items.name: Malware Triage
items.description: Automated triage workflow for potential malware incidents. Enriches indicators, isolates affected endpoints, and creates a detailed investigation report.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Phishing Email Response
items.description: Handles phishing email reports end-to-end: header analysis, link reputation checks, mailbox purge, and user notification.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Ransomware Response
items.description: Critical-severity ransomware containment: immediate network isolation, shadow copy status, backup verification, and executive notification.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Brute Force Account Lockout
items.description: Responds to brute-force login attempts: account lockout, source IP block, MFA enforcement check, and affected-user notification.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Data Exposure Response
items.description: Handles suspected data-exposure incidents: asset identification, access log review, external notification assessment, and remediation tracking.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Privilege Escalation Response
items.description: Investigates privilege-escalation events: session review, lateral movement tracing, account suspension, and privilege audit.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Web Application Attack Response
items.description: Automated response to web-application attacks (SQLi, XSS, RCE): WAF rule creation, log collection, vulnerability triage, and patch-management ticket creation.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Insider Threat Investigation
items.description: Structured investigation for insider-threat cases: activity baseline, DLP alert correlation, HR notification workflow, and evidence preservation.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Cloud Misconfiguration Remediation
items.description: Remediates cloud misconfigurations: resource identification, exposure window calculation, automated remediation script, and CSPM alert closure.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Account Compromise Response
items.description: Responds to compromised account indicators: forced password reset, session revocation, MFA re-enrollment, and activity timeline generation.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Endpoint Isolation & Forensics
items.description: Isolates a compromised endpoint via EDR API, captures memory and disk artefacts for forensic analysis, and triggers downstream investigation.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Credential Compromise Response
items.description: Handles credential-dumping events: process termination, memory capture, SIEM correlation, and credential-reset orchestration across linked accounts.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: C2 Beacon High-Frequency Periodic Connections
items.description: Detects C2 beaconing based on high-frequency periodic network connections.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: DNS Data Exfiltration via Tunnelling
items.description: Detects DNS tunnelling activity used for data exfiltration.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Internal Network Port Scan
items.description: Identifies internal network port scanning activity.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Ransomware - Mass File Extension Modification
items.description: Detects rapid mass file rename operations with known ransomware extension patterns.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Living-off-the-Land Binary Abuse (LOLBAS)
items.description: Detects abuse of legitimate Windows binaries to execute malicious payloads.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Credential Dumping - LSASS Memory Access
items.description: Detects memory access attempts against lsass.exe with credential-dumping access masks.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: AWS Root Account Console Login
items.description: Detects any console sign-in using the AWS root account.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: AWS S3 Bucket Made Public
items.description: Detects when an S3 bucket ACL or policy is modified to allow public access.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Brute Force - Multiple Failed Authentication Attempts
items.description: Detects brute-force or password-spray attacks with >10 failures in 5 minutes.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: Impossible Travel - Authentication from Two Distant Geolocations
items.description: Detects geographically impossible login sequences indicating credential compromise.
items.author: AiSOC

items.name: SQL Injection Attempt via Web Application
items.description: Detects SQL injection payloads in HTTP request parameters.
items.author: AiSOC
